title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies:
Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies!
